messages.welcome: Hello! I'm your assistant. How can I help you today?
messages.error_generic: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
messages.error_ai: I can't connect to the brain. Make sure Ollama is running.
messages.confirm_action: I'm about to do it. Shall I proceed?
messages.action_done: Done! Can I help with anything else?
messages.not_understood: Sorry, I didn't catch that. Could you repeat?
